fast.label: Fast (low-TTFB interactive)
fast.description: Lowest TTFB. Smaller chunks and conservative sampling for interactive agents.

balanced.label: Balanced (default)
balanced.description: Cycle-1 default behaviour. Operator-tunable for exact byte-compatibility (A-PR-1).

quality.label: Quality (buffered audiobook chapter)
quality.description: Higher-fidelity preset with full post-processing pipeline and FLAC output (buffered only).
